summary: Cycle I (9th overnight-triage fire of UTC 2026-05-23, ~55min after cycle H — 3rd consecutive ~1h cycle after E→F outlier; natural-variability interpretation now established beyond reasonable doubt) ran heartbeat-only. Both queues absent on disk for 30th consecutive cycle. regen-all clean: ALL CHECKS PASSED, round-trip 0 failures sustained (23s elapsed at 12:00:59Z; heartbeat at 12:01:18Z status=PASS). Three substantive findings beyond pure heartbeat: (1) GATE-FAIL semantics 4th-observation corroboration — cycle I found heartbeat status=GATE-FAIL at cycle open (12:00:40Z) written by post-commit-hook at 11:07:06Z for HEAD d10285c9 (cycle H's commit). This is positive direct evidence captured verbatim, adding to cycle F's 2 observations (ca542750 + f5a3168b) + cycle H's ce095dfd for a 4-observation pattern. (2) Routine-cron 2nd negative case confirmed — 2ac7d595 (post-cycle-H routine cron, AMD-019/020 auto-clean) landed between cycle H's commit and cycle I open, but the heartbeat at cycle I open still showed head_sha=d10285c9 from 11:07:06Z, NOT head_sha=2ac7d595. This means 2ac7d595's post-commit hook did NOT touch the heartbeat, matching cycle H's identical finding for e4db2359 — making the routine-cron-doesn't-touch-heartbeat finding 2-observation-confirmed. (3) Cadence natural-variability established across 3 consecutive cycles — H→I ~55min, G→H ~55min, F→G ~56min — three consecutive ~1h cycles after the E→F ~5h outlier; cadence interpretation now established beyond reasonable doubt. Founder H→I window quiet (0 substantive + 1 routine cron 2ac7d595), consistent with sleep continuation. Three pre-existing untracked Founder files unchanged from cycle H close. Single yellow user-context-gate continues (main-flows.html ~8.41d stale, was 8.37d at H — natural drift). Metric-integrity attestation: HONEST — empty-inbox honestly recorded; GATE-FAIL 4th-observation is positive direct evidence captured verbatim; routine-cron 2nd negative case is direct evidence from heartbeat state read at cycle open. Seven carry-over Founder action items preserved unchanged from cycle H close (no new items, no drops; cycle I sharpens evidence on items #1 cadence-3rd-cycle-confirmation and #7 GATE-FAIL 4th-observation + 2nd routine-cron negative case). Token consumption at 86%/100% wellness threshold (86k/100k); cycle J/K may trigger rest checkpoint.
founder_action_items: Cron cadence - now 14th consecutive flag. Cycle I's H→I gap (~55min) is the 3rd consecutive ~1h cycle after the E→F ~5h outlier. The natural-variability interpretation is now established beyond reasonable doubt; the E→F outlier is fully accounted for as a single anomaly event. Original Founder-action remains: edit overnight-triage cron prompt to add Step-0 guard that exits clean if `git log --since='3h'` shows no inbox motion AND last regen-all heartbeat is < 60 min old. Founder may also consider that 30 consecutive empty-inbox cycles is itself a signal worth a Step-0 guard regardless of cadence variability.

Will trip on every cycle until FIQ activity resumes or remedy lands (4 remedies enumerated in cycle B post-commit observation).

A12_operational - sustained yellow as of cycle H (continued oscillation across rolling-window mechanics). Cycle I ran clean; current dimension score visible in cycle I's regenerated docs/reports/app-health.html.

Heartbeat `status: GATE-FAIL` field semantics - NOW 4-OBSERVATION-CONFIRMED + 2x ROUTINE-CRON NEGATIVE-CASE CONFIRMED. Cycle I found heartbeat status=GATE-FAIL at cycle open (12:00:40Z) written by post-commit-hook at 11:07:06Z for HEAD d10285c9 (cycle H's commit). Combined with cycle F's two observations (ca542750 + f5a3168b) + cycle H's ce095dfd, the pattern is now 4-observation-confirmed: post-commit-hook for `Overnight triage ...` commits writes status=GATE-FAIL within a few minutes. Critically, between cycle H's commit and cycle I open, one routine cron commit (2ac7d595 AMD-019/020 auto-clean) landed — but the heartbeat at cycle I open still showed head_sha=d10285c9 from 11:07:06Z, NOT head_sha=2ac7d595. This matches cycle H's identical finding for e4db2359 — making the routine-cron-doesn't-touch-heartbeat finding 2-observation-confirmed. Founder-action recommendation stable (unchanged from cycle H): inspect `.husky/post-commit` to find (1) what `Overnight triage ...` commits trigger that AMD-019/020 auto-clean does NOT, and (2) why that trigger writes status=GATE-FAIL instead of PASS. Cycle I stops short of inspecting the hook source — that crosses into 'investigate, propose fix' territory which is a Founder-decision boundary for governance change.
